name: vc_relax_high_acc
description: Variable-cell relaxations that verify whether the agent can return consistent relaxed structures.
prompt_template: For {material_context}, perform a variable-cell relaxation (vc-relax) calculation. Require a strict energy convergence of 1 meV/atom. {parameter_context}. {pseudopotential_text}. Return the fully relaxed structure (atomic parameters).
